title: Scottish Haggis Stew
description: A hearty and traditional Scottish stew made with haggis, a savory mixture of sheep's heart, liver, and lungs. Serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat.
2. Brown the haggis on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the beef stewing steak and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the chopped carrots, potatoes, neeps, and beef broth.
7. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
